name: Furry Femboys
short_description: Furry Femboys... Your dream coming true...
detailed_description:
The game

Furry Femboys is a puzzle game, each level comes with an increase in the challenge. 3 Unique exclusive puzzle formulas await you, every level contains unique hand drawn artwork!!

Features

- Enjoy 12 levels with unique puzzle formulas and art.

- Completing levels unlock new animated gallery art, revealing our femboys!

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
